label: Google Gemini
description: Connect to Google's Gemini API for generative AI, chat, and multimodal tasks via an API key from Google AI Studio.

form.title: Connect Google Gemini
form.subtitle: Paste your Google AI Studio API key to start using Gemini models in Anton.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Grab an API key from Google AI Studio in seconds — no OAuth app setup, no billing required for the free tier. Paste it below and you're done.
methods.how_to:
## Get a Gemini API Key from Google AI Studio

1. Open [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com) and sign in with your Google account.
2. Click **Get API key** in the left sidebar (or top-right menu).
3. Click **Create API key** — choose an existing Google Cloud project or let AI Studio create one for you.
4. Copy the generated key (it starts with `AIza...`). It is shown only once in the modal; copy it now.
5. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- Free-tier keys have per-minute and per-day rate limits. Upgrade to a paid plan in [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/) if you need higher throughput.
- This key grants access to all Gemini models available to your project. Restrict it to the Generative Language API in Cloud Console → **APIs & Services → Credentials** if you want to limit scope.
- If you need enterprise-grade controls, SLAs, or VPC access, use **Vertex AI** instead (a separate connector).
- Rotate a compromised key in AI Studio → **Get API key** → delete the old key and create a new one.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your Gemini API key from aistudio.google.com → Get API key.

fields.name: model
fields.label: Default Model
fields.description: The Gemini model Anton uses by default. You can override this per-request.

fields.name: api_base_url
fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: Override only if you are proxying requests or using a regional endpoint. Leave blank for the default.
